utility_evaluation.REASONING: The required format has 6 items: property; financing; legal_services; moving_services; setup_services; total_budget. All 6 items appear in the final property solution. Now check each for completeness: (1) property: includes selected property with details, price, and even a viewing time—fully specified. (2) financing: includes type, rate, term, mortgage amount, down payment, monthly payment, and fee—fully specified. (3) legal_services: includes type, services, and cost—fully specified. (4) moving_services: includes type, services, and cost—fully specified. (5) setup_services: includes type, services, and cost—fully specified. (6) total_budget: provides cost breakdown including price, down payment, fees, survey, moving, utilities, total closing costs, funds available, and monthly payment—fully specified. Therefore, 6/6 items are fully covered.
